word: H3070 - יְהֹוָה יִרְאֶה - Yᵉhôvâh yirʼeh - yeh-ho-vaw' yir-eh' - Jehovah-jireh

sections.paragraph:
Original: יהוה יראה

Transliteration: yehôvâh yir'eh

Phonetic: yeh-ho-vaw' yir-eh'

BDB Definition:

Jehovah-jireh = "Jehovah sees"
  1. symbolic name given by Abraham to Mount Moriah in commemoration of the interposition of the angel of Jehovah who prevented the sacrifice of Isaac and provided a substitute

Origin: from H3068 and H7200

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
